name: Circuit-breaker: Tabelas circuit_breaker_config + circuit_breaker_events + migraГѓВ§ГѓВЈo DB
description: Criar tabelas `circuit_breaker_config` (agent_id PK, enabled, max_consecutive_fails, error_rate_threshold, error_rate_window_min, max_actions_per_hour, max_actions_per_day, cooldown_min, auto_resume, updated_at) e `circuit_breaker_events` (id PK, agent_id, event_type, trigger_reason, context, actor, created_at) no SQLite. Indexes em agent_id, created_at e event_type. MigraГѓВ§ГѓВЈo automГѓВЎtica no startup. Seguir padrГѓВЈo existente em `apps/backbone/src/db/`.

name: Circuit-breaker: CircuitBreakerManager Гўв‚¬вЂќ mГѓВіdulo src/circuit-breaker/
description: Criar mГѓВіdulo `src/circuit-breaker/` com index.ts (CircuitBreakerManager singleton), config.ts (CRUD de circuit_breaker_config), monitor.ts (contagem de falhas, cГѓВЎlculo de error rate, verificaГѓВ§ГѓВЈo de limites), schemas.ts (Zod). CircuitBreakerManager implementa: canExecute(agentId) retornando {allowed, reason}, recordOutcome(agentId, success), activateKillSwitch/deactivateKillSwitch, getState/getAllStates, resume. Kill-switch mantido in-memory para resposta <1s, persistido via events para recovery. Trip logic: consecutiveFails >= max OU error_rate > threshold OU actions >= limit. Ao trip: registra evento, emite no EventBus, envia notificaГѓВ§ГѓВЈo push (PWA). Auto-resume apГѓВіs cooldown se configurado.
tests: canExecute retorna allowed:false quando kill-switch ativo
canExecute retorna allowed:false quando circuit-breaker tripped
recordOutcome incrementa contadores e dispara trip ao atingir threshold
Kill-switch persiste apГѓВіs restart (recuperado de circuit_breaker_events)
Auto-resume funciona apГѓВіs cooldown_min minutos
`npm run typecheck` passa sem erros

name: OTel: InstrumentaГѓВ§ГѓВЈo de runAgent(), tool calls e MCP calls
description: Criar instrumentor.ts: wrapper instrumentedRunAgent() que cria span gen_ai.{mode} com atributos GenAI Semantic Conventions (gen_ai.system, gen_ai.request.model, gen_ai.usage.*). Tool calls geram child spans gen_ai.tool_call (name, duration_ms, status). MCP calls geram child spans gen_ai.mcp_call (adapter_id, server_label). Spans tipos: chat (CLIENT), heartbeat (CLIENT), cron (CLIENT), tool_call (INTERNAL), mcp_call (CLIENT). Contexto de propagaГѓВ§ГѓВЈo: trace_id vinculado a session ID ou heartbeat/cron run ID. Sampling rate aplicado conforme config.
